title: Grit Studio Run Operation Identity Owner
forbids: Run in Game admission keyed by content fingerprints or durable ownership represented outside the operation runtime ledger
why: Packet 2 makes request id the only Run in Game operation identity and gives the runtime one durable ownership lease for shared Civ7 deployed-mod resources.
remediate: Admit Run in Game operations by requestId, keep content digests as correlation data only, and route restart reconciliation through RunOperationRecord plus RuntimeOwnershipLease.
message: Run in Game operation identity drifted away from request-id admission and durable ownership lease records.
